title: Egypt
html:
Egypt

Egypt is the cleanest manifestation-cycle in the Yahir corpus — listed on a 2021 bucket list, actually walked in 2023, banked as story material in 2024. Each step is documented; together they form a 2-year arc that pre-dates and validates the explicit manifestation framing in 2023 12 29 vision for big life.

The bucket-list moment is in 2021 05 04 turkey egypt bucket list (May 2021) — Yahir, 18, drafting the Dutch Bros roasting-facility quitting letter and a three-line travel wishlist: Egypt, Turkey, Central America, Brazil. The list is on the same page as the "I know my intuition is telling me to leave this job, so that is what I must do" line — the earliest documented appearance of intuition-as-decision-tool. Egypt sits on that page as raw aspiration, no plan.

By Sep 2023 (2023 09 06 untitled — referenced from 2023 05 13 travel trip log's cryptic "Jordan/Israel/Egypt - refer to journal entry") the trip has happened. The May 2023 trip-log is a compact catalog of five trips (Houston flight-loss, Kentucky UFC at "a dirt ass Chinese restaurant," Idaho surprise pickup, DC hostel bug bites, and the Jordan/Israel/Egypt arc) where Egypt is bracketed with the Levant — meaning he made it a single Mid-East trip, not separate journeys. The "refer to journal entry" line is itself a marker: Yahir is treating the Mid-East stretch as substantial enough to warrant a separate long-form document rather than a bullet-list. (That long-form lives elsewhere in the corpus, possibly in Google Docs.)

By August 2024 (2024 08 14 travel occurrences) Egypt has become story bank. Two entries in the catalog: "The gnarliest food poisoning of his life in the white desert" and the implicit Levant cluster ("Essentially moneyless between Jordan and Israel thanks to a rogue credit union" — geographically adjacent to the Egypt arc). The white-desert food poisoning is the headline — it's the kind of detail he banks for the "could be a great travel content creator" line in 2024 11 28 leading thoughts about 6 month adventure. The fact that the rogue credit union moneyless-between-borders incident sits next to it confirms that the entire Mid-East trip was a single high-friction adventure, not a comfortable tourism stretch.

Egypt is one of the four pre-China chapter geographies (with India, Vietnam, Jordan) that establish: by the time Yahir lands in Shanghai in Sept 2024, he has already been on the road in three continents. China was not the start of his traveling life — it was the longest stay.

Source summaries

  • 2021 05 04 turkey egypt bucket list
  • 2023 05 13 travel trip log
  • 2024 08 14 travel occurrences
